description: Model a custom optical breadboard in SolveSpace consisting of a 100x100 mm base plate with a 10 mm thickness. The breadboard must feature a 4x4 grid of 6 mm diameter holes through the plate, spaced 25 mm apart in both X and Y directions, with the first hole centered at coordinates (-37.5, -37.5). Save the resulting file to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/optical_breadboard.slvs.
